summary: Comprehensive research on porting 2400-line paper_overview.md to sn-jnl LaTeX format. Identified notation mapping, code listing strategy (lstlisting), table conversion (booktabs), and 5-phase implementation approach. Key challenge: ~50 code blocks and ~15 tables requiring conversion.

artifacts.summary: Research report covering notation conversion, code listing strategy, table formatting, bibliography setup, and phased implementation plan

next_steps: Run /plan 3 to create detailed implementation plan
